jobDescription: Acme Corp is hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale our core APIs. You will work with TypeScript, Node.js and PostgreSQL on Kubernetes. Apply by 2026-08-15.
Globex is looking for a Frontend Engineer to build performant user interfaces with React, Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Strong CSS fundamentals and an eye for design are a must.
Join Initech as a DevOps Engineer. You'll own our CI/CD pipelines, Terraform infrastructure and on-call rotation on AWS. Applications close on September 30, 2026.
Hooli is seeking a Data Scientist to build models over our search and recommendation data. Requirements: Python, SQL, and experience shipping ML to production.
Umbrella Corporation is recruiting a Site Reliability Engineer. Own reliability, observability and incident response for our platform. Deadline: 2026-10-05.
Stark Industries wants a Machine Learning Engineer to take research models into production. You should know PyTorch, distributed training and model serving.
